answers: Science branches: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Astronomy. Science drives innovation and technology.
Science is how we understand the universe. Physics explains forces and energy, Chemistry explains matter, Biology explains life, and Astronomy explores space.
Key science branches: Physics (matter/energy), Chemistry (substances/reactions), Biology (living organisms), Astronomy (universe and space).
Science = asking 'why' and testing answers. It powers medicine, technology, and our understanding of everything from atoms to galaxies.
